particulars.description: All that freehold interest in the land and property known as 155 lower richmond road london SW15 1HH and registered at the land registry with title absolute under title number TGL190803.

By way of legal charge: (I) the freehold and leasehold property specified in each legal charge;(ii) the property including but not limited to the freehold property known as 155 lower richmond road, london, SW15 1HH (tn: TGL190803) and all related rights; and (iii) all property, acquired by the chargor in the future. By way of fixed charge, the intellectual property and all related rights. Terms defined above shall have the same meaning as that in the debenture.
